data.title: ARB IOT to conduct reverse stock split
data.description:
• ARB IOT (NASDAQ:ARBB) said the firm has approved a one-for-fifteen reverse share split of the company’s issued and unissued ordinary shares.
  • The split will begin on June 2.
  • The firm said the split is intended to increase the per-share trading price of the shares to help the company regain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price rule.

data.title: Southwest Airlines lands a bull rating from Deutsche Bank
data.description:
Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) rose in early trading on Thursday after Deutsche Bank upgraded the airline stock to a Buy rating after having it set at Hold.

Analyst Michael Linenberg pointed to Southwest's (NYSE:LUV) refreshed board of directors and Elliott Management as having ushered in a new era of change at the company, which the firm thinks will drive higher shareholder returns. Southwest's (LUV) current strategic initiatives are expected to drive meaningful revenue and EBIT growth over the next 12 to 24 months. Buybacks were also highlighted as a potential tailwind for shares.

Deutsche Bank's new forecast reflects $100 million of EBIT improvement for LUV in 2025, $465 million in 2026, and $700 million in 2027.

Looking ahead, Linenberg and his team think Southwest's (LV) return on invested capital will significantly improve over the next two years. "Southwest is in the middle of the largest transformation in company history and we are confident that its new board and management team will execute its transformation plan with considerable success."

Shares of Southwest Airlines (LUV) were up 1.9% in premarket action. LUV has outperformed the Dow Jones US Airlines Index and U.S. Global Jets ETF (JETS) on a year-to-date basis.

data.title: Hamilton Lane raises dividend by 10.2% to $0.54
data.description:
• Hamilton Lane (NASDAQ:HLNE) declares $0.54/share quarterly dividend, 10.2% increase from prior dividend of $0.49.
  • Forward yield 1.23%
  • Payable July 7; for shareholders of record June 20; ex-div June 20.
  • See HLNE Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Q1 U.S. corporate profits drop 3.6% Q/Q
data.description:
U.S. Q1 corporate profits: -3.6% Q/Q vs. +5.9% in Q4, according to data released by the U.S. Commerce Department on Thursday.

Developing...check back for updates.

data.title: Koppers appoints James Sullivan as chief transformation officer
data.description:
• Koppers (NYSE:KOP) announced on Thursday the appointment of James A. Sullivan as president and chief transformation officer, effective June 1, 2025.
  • The company said Sullivan will lead the newly established Transformation Office, a cross-functional team responsible for coordinating and execute the company's Catalyst Initiative, an enterprise-wide transformation process designed to challenge the status quo and change the way the company approaches performance improvements across all facets of the organization.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Super League Enterprise announces pricing of public offering
data.description:
• Super League Enterprise (NASDAQ:SLE) announced on Thursday the pricing of a firm commitment underwritten public offering, with gross proceeds to the company expected to be approximately $500,000.
  • The offering consists of 4,166,666 shares of common stock. The public offering price per share of common stock is $0.12.
  • In addition, the company has granted the underwriter an overallotment option to purchase up to an additional 416,666 shares of common stock, which option is exercisable in whole or in part at any time up to 45 days after the date of this prospectus.
  • Aggregate gross proceeds to the company are expected to be approximately $500,000, or $550,000 if the over allotment option is exercised in full.
  • The transaction is expected to close on or about May 30, 2025.
  • The company expects to use the net proceeds from the offering, together with its existing cash, for general corporate purposes and working capital and the repayment of a portion of indebtedness.
  • Shares of SLE plunged over 47% to $0.12 during premarket trading.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Revelation Biosciences announces pricing of $4M public offering
data.description:
• Revelation Biosciences (NASDAQ:REVBW) on Thursday announced the pricing of a public offering of 3.64M shares of its common stock, together with warrants to purchase up to 14.6M shares of its common stock at an offering price to the public of $1.10 per share and associated warrant.
  • The warrants will have an exercise price of $1.10 per share, are exercisable beginning on the effective date of stockholder approval of the issuance of the shares upon exercise of the warrants, and will expire five years following the initial exercise date.
  • The closing of the offering is expected to occur on or about May 29.
  • The gross proceeds to the company from the offering are expected to be approximately $4 million.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Karman Space & Defense acquires ISP
data.description:
• Karman Space & Defense (NYSE:KRMN) on Wednesday said it has acquired ISP, a supplier of specialty energetic propulsion technologies including small boost motors and solid propellant gas generators for UAS, UAS intercept and rocket-assisted takeoff systems markets.
  • The transaction closed on May 28, 2025.
  • On May 27, 2025, Karman successfully closed an offering to increase the size of its existing $300 million Term Loan B by $75 million.
  • The majority of the proceeds from this offering were used to fund the acquisition of ISP, which consisted of $50 million in cash, about $5 million in Karman common shares and $5 million in potential earnout payments.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Kopin announces CFO retirement
data.description:
• Kopin (NASDAQ:KOPN) announced on Thursday the retirement of CFO Rich Sneider.
  • The company said it has begun a search for Sneider’s replacement, which will include consideration for both internal and external candidates.
  • Sneider is expected to continue in his current role until such time as a successor is named and otherwise assist in the transition, it added.
  • Shares of KOPN were marginally up +0.74% to $1.35 during premarket trading.
  • Source: Press Release
